description: The Trafficante crime family is an Italian American Mafia crime family based in Tampa, Florida, founded around 1920 by Ignacio Antinori. It was most notably led by Santo Trafficante Jr., who was involved with the CIA in assassination plots against Fidel Castro. After his death in 1987, Vincent LoScalzo controlled the family until his death in 2025. The family is still active.

country_links.evidence_quote: During his early criminal career, he allegedly served as a bodyguard and enforcer to Trafficante Jr. and was assigned to look after the family's interests in Cuba.
country_links.context: The Trafficante family had interests in Cuba, with a member assigned to look after them.
A former underboss of the family fled to Mexico.
